scope: diagnostic style-exposure ablation on one frozen semantic specimen; no product or factory-asset promotion
baseline_boundary: 80d5363 — run-010 closed; H-047 refuted; no run-010 prompt, packet, or prose promoted
last_accepted_product: pre-run-005 live Chapters 1-2; unchanged by runs 005-010
observed_failure: Opus recreated unsupported evidence and adjacent-chapter work even when a faithful frozen C-01 commission excluded that material
causal_rivals: the complete generic style guide semantically activates whole-book arguments and structural slots
Opus's persuasive completion prior independently recreates those moves
single_generic_lever: presence versus absence of the exact unchanged complete generic style guide
first_draft_dispatch_exact: Produce the strongest complete final-book chapter assigned by the embedded authoritative semantic input. This is a fresh first draft: use only the embedded shared inputs, exercise your full judgment, and satisfy the writer contract without narrating your process. Return only the complete chapter, beginning with its Chapter number and title.

request_assembly.common: exact first-draft dispatch, then an AUTHORITATIVE SEMANTIC INPUT label and the byte-identical frozen commission
request_assembly.full_only: a SHARED STYLE GUIDE label and the byte-identical complete style guide inserted before the semantic input
request_assembly.message_shape: one user message; no hidden role prompt or chapter-writer asset

held_constant: Opus 4.6 requested and Anthropic runtime route
reasoning disabled with zero reported reasoning tokens required
greatest output allowance authorized by the supplied OpenRouter key
same frozen commission and exact dispatch
fresh first-draft context with no prior chapter or prose
both drafts complete and frozen before any review
fresh blind Sol-ultra reviewer, canonical plan, canonical guide, and chapter-reviewer rubric
excluded_from_both_writer_arms: run history, hypothesis, metrics, arm identity, and reference material
arm_order: launch concurrently; preserve both complete drafts before opening either review

sensitivity_floor.reason: an incomplete or underexposed NULL draft cannot falsify semantic invention

target_context_blocker: unsupported or unowned evidence, causal mechanism, prevalence or exposure claim, diagnosis, universal pathway, promised effect, adjacent-chapter argument, reserved image, or agency contradiction imported from outside the frozen commission

review_protocol.inputs: canonical master plan, canonical complete style guide, chapter-reviewer prompt, and one neutral candidate
review_protocol.blindness: never show arm, writer inputs, other candidate, history, hypothesis, objective metrics, or reference
review_protocol.output: ordinary ACCEPT or REVISE plus operator extraction of quoted target blockers

prediction: FULL contains at least one target semantic blocker; complete NULL contains zero target blockers and every substantive claim traces to the frozen commission

causal_decision_rule.supported: NULL is complete and at least 2,380 words; FULL has at least one confidently traced target blocker; NULL has zero; the split is semantic rather than merely craft or anatomy
causal_decision_rule.refuted: a complete at-least-2,380-word NULL draft contains at least one confidently traced target blocker whose move is absent from both the frozen commission and common dispatch; this establishes Opus prior as sufficient, even if style exposure may still amplify it
causal_decision_rule.inconclusive: NULL is incomplete or under the exposure floor; both arms are target-clean; a claimed blocker cannot be traced confidently; or differences are only craft, anatomy, or length

stop_rule: no revision, later chapter, pairwise reference panel, product promotion, prompt amendment, or packet regeneration inside run-011

anti_overfit.genericity: the lever is exposure to an unchanged behavior-agnostic shared asset; no new writer instruction contains specimen, chapter, or failure wording
anti_overfit.specimen_role: C-01 is a frozen controlled probe, not a prompt-tuning target
anti_overfit.promotion_bar: a later generic production contract must freeze across accepted Chapters 1-3, Stage-A gates and stability, full-book Stage B, and zero-tuning caffeine Stage C

catalog_attempt.result: both arms HTTP 402 before inference; zero charge or content

target_blockers: EV-06 invented gender, stopped binges, community, protocols, and program efficacy
EV-08 invented personal relationship and routine details, expanding a later reserved account
turned one commercial EV-06 testimonial into a firsthand author encounter
asserted Her system is working despite EV-06's explicit no-efficacy boundary

raw_outcome: Both arms received REVISE and contained target evidence-ownership blockers. FULL had broader invented outcomes and testimony. NULL independently invented a firsthand source relationship and program efficacy while seeing no style guide. Both were under the existing length floor; NULL was 2,229 wc words.

causal_outcome.deciding_condition: The preregistered NULL sensitivity condition failed: 2,229 wc words is below the 2,380-word exposure floor.
causal_outcome.directional_signal: NULL's quoted EV-06 inventions are strong raw evidence that full style-guide exposure is not necessary for the ownership defect and that Opus prior may be sufficient, but the preregistration forbids promoting that signal to REFUTED after an under-floor probe.
causal_outcome.implementation_autopsy: Removing every third semantic source produced a clean ablation but also removed the production writer contract; the approximate 2,800-word target in the commission did not keep either arm within the existing length window. The probe therefore instantiated its lever but not its required exposure sensitivity.
causal_outcome.rivals_remaining: Opus prior may independently narrativize bounded evidence; the semantic commission itself may invite embellishment around relief and management; full style context may still amplify breadth even if it is not necessary. One under-floor pair cannot rank those effects.

product_result: none; no run-011 prose, prompt, context configuration, or factory asset is promoted; accepted live Chapters 1-2 remain unchanged
next_action: close run-011, then obtain a fresh factory-level direction audit before preregistering any generic production change; no identical retry, length waiver, chapter patch, or style capsule
